CRC 3.740 REVIEW - DISMISSAL ON FILE.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-10-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment pursuant to CCP 664.6 is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
